title: UI-kit + design tokens + Pinia stores + base composables
description: Base UI layer: design tokens (CSS vars), reusable U/ components, Pinia stores, base composables. Race-Style Dark theme. NO hardcoded colors or URLs.

tokens.note: If exists — read_file first, extend only. Never overwrite.

list: UModal.vue — teleport body, focus trap, ESC close
UBreadcrumbs.vue — crumbs:{label,href}[], emits Schema.org BreadcrumbList JSON-LD
components.rule: All colors via CSS vars from tokens.css ONLY. defineOptions({name:'U<Name>'}).

list: authStore.ts — user, token, refresh, login(), logout(), refreshToken()
cartStore.ts — items, total, addItem(), removeItem(), clear()

composables: useApi.ts — useFetch wrapper with baseURL from useRuntimeConfig, handles 401 -> authStore.refreshToken()
contracts: NO hardcoded colors — only CSS vars from tokens.css
UBreadcrumbs MUST emit Schema.org BreadcrumbList JSON-LD
acceptance_criteria: UButton renders all 3 variants without type errors
themeStore toggles theme, state persists in localStorage
